name: Chocolate Petal Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease a 9-inch pie plate.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat together butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add egg and vanilla extract; continue beating until combined.
5. Stir flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt in another bowl.
6. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture.
7. Form the dough into two rolls, each about 1-1/2 inches in diameter.
8. Slice one roll into 1/8-inch pieces and arrange them on top of and along the bottom of the prepared pie plate (small gaps will not affect the pie).
9. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until set.
10. Allow the crusts to cool completely.
Note: The remaining dough can be frozen for later use.
